calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
William Norman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sarum GCI LLC.,
Order waiving live testimony of witness is in the court's file.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Land Capital Holdings, L.P.; Capital Group, Inc.; and Scott Davison joint and servarl as follows:
Damages $5,044,690.61
Prejudgment Interest $917,721.04
Attorney's Fees $10,436.00
Costs $738.00
Judgment signed in open court.
